_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalized Human Schwann Cell Lines Derived From Tumors of Schwannomatosis Patients.

_contextSnippet: Both the parental tumors and the cell lines expressed transcripts for S100B, p75/NGFR, and NGF...SMARCB1 expression was downregulated 8 fold in painful schwannomatosis tumor and 5 fold in the non-painful schwannomatosis tumor...Hnp-SWN-14O and Hp-SWN-14F showed similar expression of SMARCB1 to the parent tumors
details: Maintained expression of Schwann cell markers S100B, p75/NGFR, and NGF, with SMARCB1 expression levels similar to parent tumors (8-fold downregulation in painful tumor line, 5-fold in non-painful tumor line compared to controls)
